seoTitle: Why Paraguay: Residency, Tax & Benefits | Lincoln
seoDescription: Why HNW families choose Paraguay: territorial tax, low cost, fast permanent residency and a path to citizenship. How the programme works, explained.

faqs.question: Is this citizenship by investment?
faqs.answer: No — and this distinction matters. Paraguay does not sell passports. The Investor Pass grants permanent residency by investment; citizenship is obtained later, by naturalisation, after the constitutional period of residence and subject to language, civics and physical-presence requirements.

faqs.question: What is the territorial tax system?
faqs.answer: Under a territorial system, income arising outside Paraguay is generally outside the scope of Paraguayan income tax. Domestic rates are a flat 10%. Legal residency and tax residency are separate questions, assessed on your individual facts.

faqs.question: How is an application handled?
faqs.answer: Applications are prepared end-to-end and submitted in Paraguay, to the standard the competent authorities require, with realistic timelines stated at the outset. Where another route — or another country — would serve you better, that is said plainly.

blocks.lead: One qualifying investment opens the door to permanent residency in the heart of the Southern Cone — and, in time, to a second citizenship by naturalisation. Here is what the Investor Pass is, why Paraguay is uniquely compelling, and how the path actually works.
blocks.bgAlt: Paraguay landscape at dusk — why choose Paraguay

paragraphs.text: Paraguay sits at the centre of the Southern Cone, bordered by Brazil and Argentina and anchored inside the Mercosur bloc. It pairs a genuinely open posture toward foreign investment with a territorial tax system — foreign-source income is generally outside the Paraguayan net, assessed on individual circumstances.

For internationally minded individuals and families the appeal is straightforward: Paraguay offers one of the most capital-efficient and least bureaucratic routes to a second residency anywhere in the Americas — a real foothold in a stable, growing republic that reached investment grade with Moody's (2024) and S&P (2025).
The Investor Pass is the structured route in: one qualifying investment, a clear path to permanent residency, and eligibility to naturalise after the constitutional residence period.

asideNotice.title: República del Paraguay
asideNotice.body: A constitutional republic at the heart of South America, with a long-standing openness to foreign investment and recognition of dual nationality in defined circumstances.

cards.title: Route selection
cards.text: Choose a qualifying route — real estate, financial instruments, approved tourism, or a SUACE company — matched to your objectives. (A separate film pathway also exists.)

cards.title: Qualifying investment
cards.text: The investment is made and documented to the threshold and standard the Paraguayan authorities require.

cards.title: Foreign Investor Certificate
cards.text: Once the file is complete, the MIC issues the Foreign Investor Certificate (CIE) within five business days.

cards.title: Permanent residency
cards.text: The permanent residency process is progressed with Migraciones, leading to the Paraguayan cédula.

cards.title: Citizenship
cards.text: After three years of permanent residence, eligibility to apply for citizenship by naturalisation — subject to the statutory requirements.

cards.title: One framework
cards.text: Every route converges on the same sequence — the difference is only what you invest in, and what you hold at the end.

paragraphs.text: The Investor Pass is straightforward only when it is structured correctly from the first step. Applications are prepared end-to-end and submitted in Paraguay, to the standard the competent authorities require, with realistic timelines stated at the outset.
Where another route — or another country — would serve an applicant better, that is said plainly. The objective is a credential that holds up, not the quickest possible sale.

notice.title: Global standards. Local execution.
notice.body: The two halves of every successful application — and the standard every file is held to.

asideTable.label: Handling
asideTable.value: End-to-end, on the ground in Paraguay
